title: Solve programming problems with Java - Part 2

content.problemStatement:
Welcome to **Part-2** of the Beginner's guide to solving programming problems using Java.

A quick re-cap of what was covered in [Part-1](https://www.codechef.com/learn/java-beginner/).
- Getting started with programming problems
- Basic math functions
- Conditional statements
- Logic building / Approach

Let's begin! Click on 'Next' to proceed with **Part-2**
constraints:
- $1 \leq T \leq 100$
- $1 \leq N \leq 100$
- $1 \leq M \leq N\cdot(N-1)/2$
- $1 \leq u_i, v_i \leq N$
- $u_i \neq v_i$ for each $1 \leq i \leq M$.
- The sum of $N$ over all test cases won't exceed $100$.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, output on a new line the number of good subgraphs of $G$, modulo $10^9 + 7$.
